title: Temptation Canyon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Temptation Canyon''' was a deep canyon halfway between [[Meirm City]] and [[Quay'kizac]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].

It was called ''Uurutche'zediev'' ("Temptation Canyon" in [[Sriluurian]]) because of an ancient legend of water nymphs coaxing the moon god [[Quay]] into the crevasse, then transforming into beasts and attacking him.

There was a large pool of drinkable water at the eastern end but the native [[bandigo]]s and length of the canyon left it mostly undisturbed by the native [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]].

[[Ujin Voli]] owned a hideout inside the canyon which was a former religious temple.

==Appearances==
